description:
You are a Clinical Data Manager preparing an enrollment reconciliation report for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024) for a sponsor monitoring visit. Log into OpenClinica (username: root, password: Admin123!) and create a structured report file at ~/Documents/enrollment_reconciliation.txt using data gathered from the web interface.

The report must contain the following exact section headers and details:

=== STUDY INFORMATION ===
Study Name: [Full study name from the system]
Protocol ID: [Unique identifier]
Principal Investigator: [PI Name]
Study Status: [Current status]

=== ENROLLED SUBJECTS ===
Total Subjects: [Count of all subjects in this study, regardless of status]
[For each subject, create one line formatted as follows:]
[Subject Label] | [Gender: Male/Female] | [DOB: YYYY-MM-DD] | [Status]

=== EVENT DEFINITIONS ===
Total Events: [Count of event definitions]
[For each event definition, create one line formatted as follows:]
[Event Name] | [Type: Scheduled/Unscheduled/Common] | [Repeating: Yes/No]

=== STUDY USERS ===
[For each user assigned a role in this study, create one line formatted as follows:]
[Username] | [First Name Last Name] | [Role Name]

Ensure the data is extracted via the application interface rather than direct database queries.
